audience.value: Sui Overflow judges reviewing Special - Walrus submissions asynchronously. They need the first action, real Walrus dependency, Sui proof boundary, and try-it path in under three minutes.

content_divergence.value: Balanced: restructure the source into a tight pitch, keep all claims sourced, and do not add unsupported chain or publish claims.

candidates.note_zh: 适合 AI 死亡和继承主题，Walrus/Sui 证据用冷色发光，风险边界用琥珀色。
candidates.note_en: A dark product-demo palette with cold proof accents and amber boundary markers.

candidates.note_zh: 更像评审包和证明文件，干净、可信，适合强调 receipt 和 no-success 边界。
candidates.note_en: A light audit-report palette for receipts, proof, and inspection copy.

candidates.note_zh: 偏开发者演示，Sui/Walrus 状态更突出，但不牺牲可读性。
candidates.note_en: A developer-console palette that foregrounds Walrus and Sui state.

candidates.note_zh: 强可读性，适合录屏、评审视频和短句标题。
candidates.note_en: Readable in screenshots and video, with direct product headings.

body.sample_cjk: Walrus 写入后才允许恢复。
body.sample_latin: Restore waits for a Walrus read.

candidates.note_zh: 更像严肃评审稿，适合 receipt 和机制解释页。
candidates.note_en: An editorial mix for proof-heavy pages.

body.sample_cjk: 证明面板读取 Walrus 和 Sui metadata。
body.sample_latin: The proof panel reads Walrus and Sui metadata.

candidates.note_zh: 适合突出 API route、blob id、object id 和 Move registry。
candidates.note_en: Best when code paths and object ids need to feel central.

visual_style_spectrum.note_zh: 像高端 AI devtool 发布页，能承接 Walrus/Sui proof。
visual_style_spectrum.note_en: Like a premium AI devtool launch deck with real proof surfaces.

visual_style_spectrum.note_zh: 像研究机构短报告，利于讲清楚边界。
visual_style_spectrum.note_en: Like a short research memo, good for proof boundaries.

visual_style_spectrum.note_zh: 像架构 walkthrough，机制感更重。
visual_style_spectrum.note_en: Like an architecture walkthrough, more mechanism-forward.
